description: Configuration for uploading JavaScript mapping rules used in authentication and authorization flows. These rules are typically used to implement custom business logic for a particular integration requirement.

MappingRule.description: A mapping rule configuration specifying the type and files to upload.

type.description: Type of JavaScript rule to create.

files.description: List of files or directories to upload as JavaScript mapping rules. Path to files can be relative to the IVIA_CONFIG_BASE property or fully-qualified file paths.

items.description: File path to a JavaScript mapping rule file.
